title: 8 Things the Scroll Is Doing to a Man of Faith
caption:
It's not doing nothing.

It's replacing his prayer time with information — he thinks he's being curious, he's being colonized.

It's training him to need stimulation to feel normal. Quiet becomes unbearable. God speaks in quiet.

It's feeding comparison with packaging that doesn't look like envy — curated highlight reels he's calling catching up.

It's shortening his attention span for Scripture. A man who can't sit still with the Word cannot be formed by it.

It's feeding lust with packaging that doesn't look like pornography. The algorithm knows what he slows down for. He needs to know it too.

It's giving him the feeling of being informed without the cost of being formed. Content is not discipleship.

It's pulling him out of his actual life to watch other people's. The brothers he actually needs are not on his screen.

And it's making him restless. A man who cannot be still cannot hear God. That's not a coincidence.

This is the generation's fight. Save this.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #phone #purity #realtalk #discipline #christianity
